commits: 8acfdf1: fix(ui): add dark background fallback for unspecified-language code blocks
summary: Issue #390 CSS-only fix implemented. Changed .prose pre background from transparent to #0d1117 (github-dark theme color), added .prose pre code:not(.hljs) fallback rule for language-unspecified code blocks, removed conflicting prose-pre:* utilities from FileViewerPage, simplified custom pre component to overflow-x-auto only, and added bg-red-50 to MermaidDiagram error pre to prevent dark background conflict. All 4251 unit tests pass, ESLint clean, no TypeScript errors in modified files.
